meta.title: mongodb.help
meta.description: Paste your error, question, or slow query. Get a grounded MongoDB answer.

title: mongodb.help
subtitle: Unofficial, community-run. Not affiliated with MongoDB, Inc.
placeholder: Paste your MongoDB error, question, or slow query…
empty: Start a chat. Paste your error, question, or slow query.

limit.chatLimit: You've reached your daily chat limit. Sign up for more.
limit.signedChatLimit: You've used all your daily chats. Come back tomorrow or open a ticket.
limit.messageLimit: This chat reached its message limit. Start a new chat.

credits.label: Usage
credits.anonNone: No messages left in this chat.
credits.anonLow: Only {count} message(s) left in this chat.

legal.disclaimerText: mongodb.help is an unofficial, community-run tool and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by MongoDB, Inc. "MongoDB" is a registered trademark of MongoDB, Inc. Answers are generated by AI and may be incorrect, always verify against the official MongoDB documentation before acting.
legal.termsText: By using mongodb.help you agree to use the service as-is, at your own risk. We do not warranty the accuracy of any answer. Do not submit secrets or personal data you would not want processed by third-party AI models. These terms are provisional pending legal review.
legal.privacyText: Do not submit secrets or personal data you would not want processed by third-party AI models. Anonymous usage is rate-limited by a hashed IP address that is not stored beyond the daily window. We do not sell your data.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to ask more questions and open support tickets.
auth.coolOffBody: You deleted your account recently. For fairness to all users, please wait up to {hours} hours before creating a new one.

disclaimerBanner.text: Unofficial, community-run. Not affiliated with MongoDB, Inc.

signupPrompt.title: You've hit the free limit
signupPrompt.body: Sign up free to ask more questions, keep your chat history, and open support tickets.

usage.title: Your usage
usage.anonNote: Sign up for more daily chats and longer chats.

account.title: Your account
account.description: Usage, support tickets, and your data.
account.myTicketsHint: Open or follow up on support tickets.
account.exportDataHint: Download everything we store about your account as JSON.
account.exportError: Could not export your data. Please try again.
account.deleteAccountHint: Archives your data for deletion and signs you out.
account.deleteConfirmBody: Your chats, tickets, and account data will be moved to a deletion queue and removed from the live service. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteError: Could not delete your account. Please try again or open a ticket.
account.deleteSuccess: Your account has been scheduled for deletion.

tickets.title: Support tickets
tickets.subtitle: Need more help? Open a ticket and we'll get back to you.
tickets.subject: Subject
tickets.bodyPlaceholder: What you tried, what you expected, what happened. Paste errors or queries.
tickets.anonTitle: Sign up to open a support ticket
tickets.anonBody: Tickets are available for signed-in users, free, and you get more daily questions too.
tickets.closedNotice: This ticket is closed. Open a new one if you need more help.

share.buttonHint: Get a read-only link anyone can open
share.dialogDescription: Anyone with the link can read this conversation. To continue it under their own quota, they can copy it to their own account.
share.createError: Could not create the share link. Please try again.
share.copyFailed: Copy failed — select and copy manually.
share.revokeConfirmBody: The link will stop working immediately. Copies already made by other people stay in their accounts.
share.revokeError: Could not revoke the link. Please try again.
share.disabledHint: Start a chat to share it.
share.sharedSubtitle: Read-only. Copy it to your account to continue under your own quota.
share.notFound: This shared chat is no longer available. The link may have been revoked or the original chat removed.
share.loadError: Could not load this shared chat.
share.copyHint: Creates a copy in your account. Uses one of your daily chats.
share.copySuccess: Copied! Taking you to your copy…
share.copyError: Could not copy this chat. Please try again.
share.copyLimit: You've used all your daily chats. Come back tomorrow to copy this.
share.signInHint: Copying needs a free account so the copy runs under your own rate limit.
share.signInToShareBody: Share links are created by signed-in users. Sign up free to share this chat with anyone.
